case_title: AUSTEN YUEH ET AL VS. MARKY LYNN QUAYLE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $187.50) - SERVED AUG-06-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YUEH, AUSTEN HINTON, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-24-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUSTEN YUEH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN HINTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARKY LYNN QUAYLE IS PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF A $5340 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-24-2021 IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL. (SC-152)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2020 - CONTINUED PER ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MARK LYNN QUAYLE TO FEB-02-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-03-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUSTEN YUEH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN HINTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARKY LYNN QUAYLE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS LEO QUAYLE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE DOWN DUE TO UNFORTUNATE PAYMENT TIMING. DEFENDANT MADE ELECTRONIC PAYMENTS(2) IN COURT; PROGRESS REPORT IS FOR CLEARING OF PAYMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
